dict.string: Ostler needs to ask for your administrator password to install Hub services.
Ostler reads your calendar so the Hub can surface what is on next, prepare meeting briefs, and link people to events on the wiki. Events never leave this Mac.
Ostler reads your contacts to pre-fill names and addresses during install, and to recognise who you talk to most. Contacts never leave this Mac.
Ostler scans your Desktop for social-platform data exports during install. Files stay on this Mac.
Ostler stores your knowledge graph under Documents/Ostler so it appears alongside your other documents. Files stay on this Mac.
Ostler scans your Downloads folder for social-platform data exports during install. Files stay on this Mac.
Ostler reads photo metadata (date, location, captions) so the Hub can tie memories to people, places, and events on the wiki. Photos themselves stay on this Mac.
Ostler reads and writes reminders so the Hub can push to-dos from emails, meetings, and chats into Apple Reminders. Reminders stay on this Mac and your iCloud account.
